channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: SJSU transgender volleyball player Blaire Fleming's college career likely over after championship loss
item.description: San Jose State transgender volleyball player Blaire Fleming probably played the athlete's final college volleyball game in a loss to Colorado State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Syracuse knocks No. 6 Miami out of ACC title game and possibly the playoff with 42-38 win
item.description: SYRACUSE, N.Y. (AP) — Kyle McCord and Syracuse knocked No. 6 Miami out of Atlantic Coast Conference title contention — and possibly ended the Hurricanes' College Football Playoff hopes — by rallying from a 21-0 deficit for a 42-38 win on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK FRANK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Championship volleyball game featuring transgender player opens with players kneeling during national anthem
item.description: Colorado State volleyball players knelt during the national anthem amid the controversy over a transgender athlete playing for the opponent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, KTLA 5

item.title: Sellers' 20-yard TD run with 1:08 to go lifts No. 16 South Carolina to 17-14 win over No. 12 Clemson
item.description: LaNorris Sellers' 20-yard TD run with 1:08 to play lifted No. 16 South Carolina to a 17-14 victory over No. 12 Clemson.
item.dc:creator: Pete Iacobelli, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan upsets No. 2 Ohio State 13-10 for Wolverines' 4th straight win over bitter rival
item.description: Dominic Zvada kicked a 21-yard field goal with 45 seconds left and Michigan stunned No. 2 Ohio State 13-10, ending the Buckeyes’ hopes of returning to the Big Ten title game.
item.dc:creator: Mitch Stacy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Texas A&M superfan proposes to girlfriend during ESPN's 'College GameDay' ahead of rivalry game vs. Texas
item.description: Two Texas A&M Aggie superfans got engaged after a surprise proposal during a segment on ESPN's "College GameDay" on Saturday before the Aggies play Texas on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin suffers abrasion on hip during crash on final run of World Cup giant slalom
item.description: American skier Mikaela Shiffrin says she suffered an abrasion on her left hip when crashing during her second run of a World Cup giant slalom race.
item.dc:creator: Peggy Shinn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Norris defies orders to help Piastri and Verstappen loses the Qatar pole to Russell
item.description: Lando Norris ignored team orders as he handed his McLaren teammate Oscar Piastri the win the sprint race at the Qatar Grand Prix in a one-two finish for the team.
item.dc:creator: James Ellingworth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Who is Blaire Fleming? SJSU volleyball player dominating female rivals and enraging women's rights groups
item.description: San Jose State volleyball player Blaire Fleming will play for a conference championship at the center of a political firestorm over transgender inclusion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aggies blow 17-point fourth quarter lead in loss to CSU
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State football team could not hold a 30-13 fourth quarter lead in its season finale at Colorado State, and the Aggies end the season with a 42-37 loss to the Rams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers extend contract of postseason hero
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have agreed to a contract extension with one of the key pieces of the team's World Series title run. The Dodgers reached agreement Friday on a deal with Tommy Edman, ensuring that the do-it-all utility-man will remain with the team for the foreseeable future.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Shedeur Sanders wins Unitas award, then goes on to break Colorado's single-season passing mark
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Shedeur Sanders woke up early Friday, won a national award, and then set No. 23 Colorado's all-time single-season passing record.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants' Dexter Lawrence suffers dislocated elbow as team's miserable season continues
item.description: The New York Giants' abysmal season took yet another big hit on Thursday, as star defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence dislocated his elbow and will be out the rest of the year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: F1 focus shifts in Qatar as McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull fight for constructors' title
item.description: LUSAIL, Qatar (AP) — Max Verstappen won big in Las Vegas with his fourth world title, but the fight for Formula 1's biggest cash prize is hotting up this week in Qatar. The lucrative constructors' championship is still wide open with McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull battling for the title.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH1, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL football on Thanksgiving
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Dallas Cowboys ended a six-game home losing streak with a 27-20 victory over the New York Giants on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: 49ers QB Brock Purdy remains severely limited by injury to his throwing shoulder
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy threw one short pass in the open portion of practice for the San Francisco 49ers as he remains slowed by an injury to his throwing shoulder that has already forced him to miss a game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lions beat Bears 23-20 to extend win streak to 10 games
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jared Goff threw two touchdown passes to Sam LaPorta, Jake Bates made three field goals in the first half and the Detroit Lions held off the Chicago Bears 23-20 on Thursday to extend their winning streak to 10 games. The Lions snapped a seven-game losing streak on Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jon Batiste, Ledisi, Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle to perform during Super Bowl pregame
item.description: The Super Bowl pregame will have some Louisiana flavor: Multi-talented performer Jon Batiste will hit the stage to sing the national anthem, while Trombone Shorty and Lauren Daigle are slated to perform “America the Beautiful.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Jose State is disappointed Boise State forfeited but looks forward to volleyball final
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State said Thursday it was disappointed Boise State forfeited its semifinal match in the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament but that the Spartans were focused on the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Sergachev scores in overtime in 3-2 Utah HC win
item.description: MONTREAL (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 27 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday. Sergachev directed a Nick Schmaltz pass through the crease inside the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: As offense ascends, Bears defense goes on sneaky decline under Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears' defense has been struggling to stop opposing offenses, resulting in a five-game losing streak, while the offense has been unable to score enough points to win games.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC busts out of offensive slump with 6-1 victory
item.description: PITTSBURGH (ABC4 Sports) - After getting shut out for the fifth time of the season, the Utah Hockey team scored a regulation-time season-high six goals in a 6-1 rout over the Pittsburgh Penguins Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
